channel.title: Monitoring on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Monitoring on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: security: Improving security posture across the Microsoft partner ecosystem
item.description:
Microsoft says it is improving security across its partner ecosystem by tightening CSP vetting, applying least-privilege access, increasing monitoring, and promoting risk-management best practices. The post is framed as guidance for partners rather than a product release.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog

item.title: github: GitHub Enterprise Server 3.21 is now generally available
item.description:
GitHub Enterprise Server 3.21 is now generally available. The release adds improvements in deployment efficiency, monitoring, code security, and policy management, including organization custom properties now generally available.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Ingestion Volume Change dashboard in Metrics Usage Insights
item.description:
Metrics Usage Insights now has an Ingestion Volume Change dashboard in public preview. It lets you compare ingestion volume over time to spot spikes or drops in time series counts and event ingestion rates.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: OpenTelemetry Metrics, Visualizations, and Enhanced Monitoring in Azure Monitor for Azure VMs and Arc Servers
item.description:
Azure Monitor for Azure VMs and Arc Servers now generally available with OpenTelemetry metrics and visualizations, providing a unified monitoring experience. The release consolidates key monitoring capabilities into a single experience.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Built-in Grafana dashboards for Azure Functions
item.description:
Azure Functions now includes built-in Grafana dashboards in generally available form. The dashboards provide Azure portal visibility into function app health, performance, and scale without needing to provision Grafana or configure data sources.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: GitHub Enterprise Server 3.21 release candidate is available
item.description:
GitHub Enterprise Server 3.21 release candidate is available. The release focuses on deployment efficiency, monitoring, code security, and policy management, with organization custom properties now generally available.

  • Source: GitHub
